redactionContract.rationale: Authorization header is never written to disk. Verify with: rg 'sk-or-[A-Za-z0-9_-]{40,}' docs/openrouter-integration-evidence/<date>.json (must return 0).

excludedFromCandidates.deepinfra: Already validated as alternate by ITOTORI-238 (HTTP 200 plain + json_schema, body conforming).
excludedFromCandidates.deepseek: Excluded from Trevor's ZDR allow-list per ITOTORI-224 call_3/call_4 (HTTP 404 'No endpoints found matching your data policy'). Per user memory project_zdr_allowlist_excludes_deepseek_implicit_cache.
excludedFromCandidates.novita: ITOTORI-238 validated plain call (HTTP 200) but json_schema returned HTTP 404 'No endpoints found that can handle the requested parameters' — does not support response_format=json_schema for this model.
excludedFromCandidates.lambda: ITOTORI-238 probe returned HTTP 404 'No allowed providers'; not present in the per-model endpoint catalog.

probePostureNote: Each candidate gets a ~200-token translation prompt under provider.only=[<alt>] + zdr=true + allow_fallbacks=false + data_collection=deny + require_parameters=true. If plain succeeds, a json_schema-mode call follows with a representative multi-field QA schema. Validation is binary: 200 plain + 200 json_schema + conforming body = VALIDATED. Anything else = NOT VALIDATED and must NOT be added to alternateProviders[].
realisticPromptTokenEstimate: ~200 prompt tokens (vs ITOTORI-238's 16-token toy call). Representative of agentic-loop QA + speakerLabel stage workloads.

messages.content:
You are an English localization assistant for a Japanese visual novel called Sweetie HD. Style guidance: tone-register=playful, register=informal-feminine, preserve onomatopoeia in romaji, do not invent character names not present in the source. The following is a single scene of dialogue between Yumeko and Haruka in early afternoon at the school courtyard. Translate each line into natural American English, preserving speaker tags and any sentinel substring the user passes via system prompt.

Source:
[ユメコ] あら、はるかちゃん、もう来てたの？
[はるか] うん、ちょっと早めに来ちゃった。だって、ユメコちゃんに会いたかったから。
[ユメコ] もー、そんなこと言われたら照れちゃう……。
[はるか] えへへ、ごめんね。でも本当だよ？
[ユメコ] じゃあ、今日は二人で図書館に行こうか。
[はるか] うん！　行きたい！
[ユメコ] STELLA-ALPHA-EN-US-SENTINEL

Translation:
[Yumeko] Oh, Haruka-chan, you're already here?
[Haruka] Yeah, I came a little early. Because I wanted to see Yumeko-chan.
[Yumeko] Aw, when you say things like that, it makes me blush...
[Haruka] Ehehe, sorry. But it's true, you know?
[Yumeko] Well then, how about we go to the library together today?
[Haruka] Yeah! I want to go!
[Yumeko] STELLA-ALPHA-EN-US-SENTINEL
